name: 7-up Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the gelatin according to the package directions, substituting 7-Up for water.
2. Let the mixture cool to room temperature.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients: mayonnaise, cottage cheese, and crushed pineapple.
4. Pour the mixture into molds.
5. Refrigerate until serving.
This was a favorite party dish at Graceland.
